objective: Build the cancel, retry, and human-gate review mutation endpoints for the /jobs API so operators can manage durable jobs without reading raw state files.

store_review_job: companion/core/durable-job-store.js — added reviewJob() method with 5 review actions
VALID_TRANSITIONS updated: running can transition to paused_review; paused_review can transition to queued, failed, cancelled
Review metadata (reviewAction, reviewedBy, reviewedAt, reviewReason) persisted via atomicWriteJob and survives restart
schema_update: companion/schemas/internal/durable-job.schema.json — added 'review' property definition with required fields
additionalProperties: true changes allow review metadata on job records
server_endpoints: POST /jobs/:id/review (calls durableJobStore.reviewJob with action, reviewedBy, reason body)

results: POST /jobs/:id/cancel cancels queued and claimed jobs, rejects running/completed/failed jobs
POST /jobs/:id/retry re-queues failed jobs with remaining attempts, increments attempt count
POST /jobs/:id/retry rejects jobs at max attempts with MAX_ATTEMPTS_EXCEEDED error
POST /jobs/:id/review with request_review transitions running to paused_review
POST /jobs/:id/review with approve transitions paused_review to queued
POST /jobs/:id/review with reject transitions paused_review to failed with HUMAN_REJECTED error
POST /jobs/:id/review with request_correction transitions paused_review to queued with correction note
POST /jobs/:id/review with stop transitions paused_review to cancelled
Review metadata (reviewAction, reviewedBy, reviewedAt, reviewReason) persists on job record
All endpoints return 404 for unknown job IDs and 400 for invalid state transitions
All endpoints respect JSON envelope shape (ok, result, error pattern)
Review metadata survives store reload (server restart)
node scripts/test-jobs-mutation.js passes all test cases (85/85)
Existing tests still pass: node scripts/test-jobs-api.js (64/64), node scripts/test-durable-job-store.js (117/117), node scripts/test-jobs-worker.js (44/44), node scripts/contract-test.js

passed: POST /jobs/:id/cancel cancels a queued or claimed job and returns the updated record
POST /jobs/:id/retry re-queues a failed job (incrementing attempt count) and returns the updated record
POST /jobs/:id/retry rejects jobs at max attempts with a clear error
POST /jobs/:id/review with action 'request_review' transitions running to paused_review
POST /jobs/:id/review with action 'approve' transitions paused_review to queued
POST /jobs/:id/review with action 'reject' transitions paused_review to failed
POST /jobs/:id/review with action 'request_correction' transitions paused_review to queued with correction metadata
POST /jobs/:id/review with action 'stop' transitions paused_review to cancelled
Review metadata (reviewAction, reviewedBy, reviewedAt, reviewReason) is persisted on the job record and survives server restart
All endpoints return 404 for unknown job IDs
All endpoints return proper error responses for invalid state transitions (400 with code and message)
node scripts/test-jobs-mutation.js passes all test cases
Existing tests still pass: node scripts/test-jobs-worker.js, node scripts/test-jobs-api.js, node scripts/test-durable-job-store.js, node scripts/contract-test.js
No changes to existing /tasks/run, /tracks/run, /workflows/run response envelope shapes
No changes to the existing store methods (createJob, claimJob, startJob, completeJob, failJob, cancelJob, retryJob)

scope_notes: Operator console UI (HTML/CSS/JS dashboard) not included
CLI commands for cancel/retry/review not included
Existing /jobs GET/POST endpoints and response envelopes unchanged
No cross-process workers, worker pools, or separate Node.js processes
stop_conditions_honored: No modifications to existing /tracks/run, /workflows/run, /tasks/run, or /analyze endpoints or their response envelopes
No modification to existing store methods (createJob, claimJob, startJob, completeJob, failJob, cancelJob, retryJob)
No modification to existing /jobs GET/POST endpoints
next_milestones: Operator console UI; CLI commands for cancel/retry/review; broader operator control plane features
